metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5228
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 6: in biochemical fractions prepared from adult rat brains, SEPTIN9 was enriched in synaptic fractions P2, synaptosomes, synaptosomal membranes, soluble synaptosomal content and crude synaptic vesicle fraction (as compared to input material / brain tissue).. Experimental description: Results, Figure 6 legend: "Proteins in various membrane fractions prepared from adult rat brain were probed for septins with the indicated a-septin antibodies."

antibody:
"Most of the antibodies were generated against the variable N or C terminal regions of each septin, with the exception of the antibodies to SEPT1, SEPT7 and SEPT9, to minimize cross reactivity (Supplementary Figure 1)."
the SEPTIN9 antibody used in the paper annotated here was validated using a LexA-fusion-protein (Figure 1).
